zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Ungle於1521年出生在英國素福爾可謝莫時，她的父親Christopher Ungle31歲，母親Agnes Barker29歲。她於1542年與Humphrey Munning在英國素福爾可布迪納姆結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1596年在她的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可謝莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Ungle于1521年出生在英国素福爾可謝莫时，她的父亲Christopher Ungle31岁，母亲Agnes Barker29岁。她于1542年与Humphrey Munning在英国素福爾可布迪納姆结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1596年在她的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可謝莫。

nameMeanings.name: Ungle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Engel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Fritz, Heinz, Rainer, Otto, Albrecht, Alois, Benno, Dieter, Elfriede, Erwin.

German, Dutch, and Danish: from a short form of various ancient Germanic personal names (see, for example, Engelbert and Engelhard ). A number of different elements have fallen together in Engel-, mainly Ingal, extended form of Ing, the name of an ancient Germanic god or folk hero, and Angel ‘Angle’. The Angles were an ancient Germanic tribe living on the Jutland peninsula; in the 5th–6th centuries they invaded eastern and northern Britain and gave their name to England (Old English Englaland ‘land of the Angles’).

German and Dutch: topographic or habitational name referring to a house bearing the sign of an angel, Middle High German engel. This surname, in both possible senses (see also 1 above), is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Ungle was born in 1521, in Semer, Suffolk, England, her father, Christopher Ungle, was 31 and her mother, Agnes Barker, was 29. She married Humphrey Munning in 1542, in Brettenham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1596, in her hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Semer, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Ungle est née en 1521, à Semer, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Christopher Ungle, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes Barker, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Humphrey Munning en 1542, à Brettenham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1596, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Semer, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen Ungle 1521 in Semer, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Christopher Ungle 31 und ihre Mutter Agnes Barker 29. Sie hat 1542 in Brettenham, Suffolk, England Humphrey Munning geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1596 im Alter von 75 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Semer, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Ungle è nata il nel 1521 nel Semer, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Christopher Ungle, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Agnes Barker, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Humphrey Munning nel 1542, nel Brettenham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1596, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Semer, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Ungleが1521年にイギリススフォルクセマーで生まれた時，父Christopher Ungleは31歳，母Agnes Barkerは29歳であった。1542年にイギリススフォルクブレッテンハムでHumphrey Munningと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1596年に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクセマーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Ungle(이)가 1521년 영국 수폴크 젬어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Christopher Ungle(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Barker(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1542년 영국 수폴크 브레텐함에서 Humphrey Munning(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1596년 그녀의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 젬어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Ungle nasceu em 1521, em Semer, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Christopher Ungle, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Barker, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Humphrey Munning em 1542, em Brettenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1596, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Semer, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Ungle родилась в 1521 г. в местности семир, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Christopher Ungle было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Barker, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey Munning в 1542 г. в местности бреттенам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1596 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности семир, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen Ungle nació en 1521, en Semer, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Christopher Ungle, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Agnes Barker, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Humphrey Munning en 1542, en Brettenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1596, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Semer, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
